description:
When a dog reacts to everything, it’s not always dominance; it’s overwhelm.
Growling, lunging, and explosive behavior often come from a dog that doesn’t know how to relax.
But the moment calm leadership steps in and the dog no longer feels responsible… everything changes, and just like that, the aggression starts to disappear. 🌟

Cuando un perro reacciona a todo, no siempre es dominio, muchas veces es que está abrumado.
Los gruñidos, lanzarse y comportamiento explosivo suelen venir de un perro q

title: How Pet Parents Can Help Reactive Dogs Relax | Better Human Better Dog
